column46: If you become a journalist you have to report both sides of a story.
As a journalist in the scenario, I chose to pick people from my country. It's harder to go to another country that just had their war ended to get "both sides".
To whom it may concern: Thank you for permitting me to participate vis-à-vis this project.
I chose to pick the first and last victims and focus more on the youth overall or people with an effect on them
I had no issues with the study. Thank you for your time.
Thank you for the opportunity to take this study!
Fun and interesting study to do.
I believe a journalist should report the facts as they are,,unbiased,, not their own opinions .
This seemed to try to replicate similarities to the Israel and Gaza conflict. I wonder if that was intentional.
Thank you for considering my input.
A few questions were hard to answer, for example "a journalist should consider all sides" - yes in general but not always true for an in-depth, focused story or sidebar
Intriguing study, haven't had one like it so far!
The design of the circles and the way you have to click on them is very fiddly and awkward.
I thought this was a very interesting study and I would take part in something like this again.
I believe journalists should report the facts that are there clearly and full frontal
I think that there are very few countries, which would statrt a war, where you would be able to be a neutral balanced journalist, i.e. Russia.
None, but good luck with your research
This study made me think about the victims and how sad it was. I tried to select a range of different people, ages, and stories to represent both sides of the conflict.
I based the number of people to be interviewed on each side to represent the wieghting on deacth numbers on each side of the conflicy as this statistically represented those affected most.

I found the study interesting, I really thought about how I would report on the conflict if I was a real journalist, and while the conflict was fictional, I felt a connection to some of the people and it made me a little sad that in real conflicts the descriptions of people used in this study could easily be attributed to real people in conflicts around the world.
Thankyou for this study, it was interesting and engaging.
I tried to select people across the whole area, representing a range of ages, and in the same proportions as the total number of victims from each side
i found this study very interesting and thought provoking
Thank you for an engaging study.
great study thank you for the participarion
